title: Shamiyr #8069
definition:
Shamir = "a point" or "thorn"

 n pr loc
 1) a town in the mountain district of Judah
 2) a town in Ephraim where the judge Tola lived and was buried
nasbUsage:
Definition: Shamir = "a point" or "thorn"

 n pr loc
 1) a town in the mountain district of Judah
 2) a town in Ephraim where the judge Tola lived and was buried

    NASB:  a city in Judah, also a city in Ephraim
